sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, val Float64, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT quantile(0.5)(val) FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= '2023-10-01 00:00:00' AND created_at < '2023-10-06 00:00:00' AND val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT quantile(0.9)(val) FROM (SELECT val FROM test_table WHERE val > 10.0 AND id < 4) AS subquery;
SELECT quantile(0.25)(val) FROM (SELECT id, val FROM test_table) AS t GROUP BY id HAVING val IS NOT NULL AND val < 15.0;
SELECT id, quantile(0.5)(val) AS median_val FROM (SELECT id, val FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= '2023-10-01') GROUP BY id HAVING median_val > 5.0 AND median_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT quantile(0.75)(val) AS third_quartile FROM (SELECT val FROM test_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val <> '') WHERE created_at >= '2023-10-03' AND created_at < '2023-10-05';
SELECT id, quantile(0.9)(val) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING id > 2 AND quantile(0.5)(val) < val;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, val FROM test_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, val FROM (SELECT val, id FROM test_table WHERE id > 1 AND created_at < '2023-10-04');
SELECT quantile(0.01)(COALESCE(val, 0)) AS low_quantile FROM temp_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val < 100;

SELECT t1.id, quantile(0.5)(t1.val) AS median_val FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id AND t1.val IS NOT NULL WHERE t1.val > 10.0 GROUP BY t1.id HAVING median_val < 20.0 AND median_val IS NOT NULL;
